_comment: SYNTHETIC fixture (hand-written, no real student data). DELIBERATELY FAILING quiz-generator batch — every QZ deterministic check has at least one violation to catch: batch grade is an INTEGER 9 (fails QZ-P5); q1 has template residue '{{topic}}' (fails QZ-P6a) and only 3 options (fails QZ-P6b); q2 has case-insensitive duplicate options (fails QZ-P6c) and correct_answer_index 4 (fails QZ-P6d); q3 has an empty explanation (fails QZ-P6e), difficulty 'very-hard' and bloom_level 'memorize' (fails QZ-P6f); distractors in q2 are absurd (fails QZ-R1 under the LLM judge).

questions.question_text: What is the degree of {{topic}} in the expression above?
questions.explanation: The degree is the highest power.

questions.question_text: If p(x) = x^2 - 3x + 2, what is p(2)?
Which of the following is NOT a polynomial?
